# Drowned Marsh

## Theme

A flooded, rotten shoreline filled with drowned corpses, mutated sea creatures and old water spirits.

## Biome Gameplay

Drowned Marsh teaches:

- avoiding slow zones
- fighting enemies with poison / decay
- handling mixed melee and caster enemies
- staying mobile in dangerous terrain

Rule:
Enemies here use water, rot and mud to slow the player down.

---

# Drowned

## Role
Basic Melee

## Difficulty
Easy

## Basic Attack
Rotten Swipe

## Ability
Mud Grip

Applies a short Slow on hit.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Attack
- Death

---

# Fisher Zombie

## Role
Melee Bruiser

## Difficulty
Medium

## Basic Attack
Heavy Bite / Hook Swipe

## Ability
Rotten Vomit

Spits a short cone of poisonous water.

Effects:
- damage over time
- small Slow

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Attack
- Spit
- Death

---

# Marsh Crab

## Role
Armored Tank

## Difficulty
Medium

## Basic Attack
Claw Snap

## Ability
Shell Guard

Briefly reduces incoming damage.

After the guard ends, performs a strong claw attack.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Attack
- Guard
- Death

---

# Drowned Elder

## Role
Biome Boss

## Difficulty
Boss

## Basic Attack
Rotten Water Bolt

## Ability 1
Flood Zone

Creates water pools that slow the player.

## Ability 2
Summon Drowned

Summons 2 Drowned enemies.

## Ability 3
Tentacle Grasp

Tentacles appear from the ground after a delay.

Effects:
- damage
- short root / slow

## Phase 2
Triggered at 50% HP.

- Flood Zones last longer.
- Summons Fisher Zombies instead of only Drowned.

## Phase 3
Triggered at 25% HP.

- casts faster
- arena becomes more flooded
- Tentacle Grasp appears in larger patterns

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Cast
- Summon
- Roar
- Death

## VFX
- muddy water
- poison splash
- water pools
- tentacles
- rotten green particles

## SFX
- wet footsteps
- zombie groan
- crab claws
- water splash
- elder chant
